values: If you lag behind, you pull your entire team back. Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down.

If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back. That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team’s safety.

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you lag behind, you pull your entire team back. Your Trek Leader has to slow everyone down. The trekkers who trained hard and showed up prepared won't take this lightly. Nobody wants to miss a summit or a breathtaking viewpoint because someone didn't train.

If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back. That's a call none of us want to make. But it is essential for your and the entire team’s safety.

values: Walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Miyar Valley Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 35 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.
To reach any fitness target, there are two things you must work on: Cardiovascular Endurance, Muscle Strength

values: Track runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app
Take 3 screenshots of runs and upload to Indiahikes Dashboard
Upload screenshots 15 to 20 days before trek date
Screenshots must demonstrate meeting the trek's fitness criteria
Runs must meet the trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Track your runs on Strava, Nike Run Club, or any similar fitness app. Take 3 screenshots of your runs and upload them to your Indiahikes Dashboard. Make sure you upload these screenshots 15 to 20 days before your trek date. We want to see that you are being consistent in your preparation. Your screenshots must demonstrate that you are meeting the fitness criteria for your trek.
Your runs don't meet your trek's fitness criteria at least 3 times in the past month.

values: 6 weeks (free 6-week training plan designed by Prathima Chhabria and Gautam Singh)

evidence.quote_or_summary: Follow this, and you'll be trek-ready in 6 weeks.

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records
Parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.

values: You will struggle and fall behind
You may miss out on the transformative experience
If fitness records are rejected, Trek Leader and Slope Manager are informed in advance
If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back

evidence.quote_or_summary: If you're not fit, you won't enjoy your trek. Simple as that. You'll struggle. You'll fall behind. And you'll miss out on the transformative experience we've designed for you.

You can still trek. But your Trek Leader and Slope Manager will be informed about your fitness levels in advance. If you fall behind the group by 45 minutes and are visibly struggling, your Trek Leader may send you back.
